# EcoEnergyCalc

> Free energy cost and carbon footprint calculators for homeowners and renters. Calculate solar savings, electric bills, carbon emissions, insulation ROI, water usage, and more — no signup required. Focused on the U.S. and global audience with an emphasis on practical, actionable results.

EcoEnergyCalc is a collection of 34 free web-based calculators and educational articles covering home energy costs, solar and renewables, carbon footprint, and water usage. All tools run client-side with no data collection. Content targets English-speaking adults in the U.S. and Europe who want to reduce energy costs and environmental impact.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://ecoenergycalc.com/): Full directory of all calculators and latest blog posts
- [Tools](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/): All calculators with search and category filter
- [About](https://ecoenergycalc.com/about.html): Site mission, methodology, and operator information
- [Blog](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/): All articles, searchable by topic
- [Privacy Policy](https://ecoenergycalc.com/privacy.html): Privacy policy and disclaimer
- [Contact](https://ecoenergycalc.com/contact.html): Contact information

## Calculators: Energy Savings

Tools for estimating home energy costs and identifying savings opportunities.

- [Home Energy Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/home-energy-cost.html): Estimate total annual home energy cost based on location, home size, and usage habits
- [Electric Bill Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/electric-bill.html): Break down a monthly electric bill by energy charge, fixed charge, and taxes; identify cost drivers
- [Appliance Energy Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/appliance-energy-cost.html): Calculate running cost of any appliance per day, month, and year by wattage and usage hours
- [LED vs Incandescent Savings Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/led-vs-incandescent.html): Quantify annual savings and CO₂ reduction from switching to LED bulbs
- [Insulation Savings Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/insulation-savings.html): Estimate heating and cooling savings from upgrading home insulation; includes IRA tax credit info
- [Heating vs Cooling Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/heating-vs-cooling.html): Compare seasonal heating and cooling costs to find where energy dollars go
- [Heating Cost by Fuel Type Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/heating-cost-by-fuel.html): Compare annual home heating costs across natural gas, electric resistance, heat pump, propane, and heating oil at user-specified local rates
- [Space Heater Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/space-heater-cost-calculator.html): Calculate exact cost to run a space heater per hour, day, and month by wattage and electricity rate
- [Washing Machine Energy Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/washing-machine-energy-cost.html): Calculate washing machine running cost per load, month, and year including electricity and water costs by washer type and temperature setting
- [Dryer Energy Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/dryer-energy-cost.html): Calculate the exact cost to run your dryer per load, month, and year by dryer type and electricity rate; compare electric vs gas vs heat pump dryers
- [Refrigerator Energy Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/refrigerator-energy-cost.html): Estimate how much your refrigerator costs to run per day, month, and year; compare old vs new models and ENERGY STAR savings
- [Dehumidifier Running Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/dehumidifier-running-cost.html): Calculate the cost to run a dehumidifier per hour, day, month, and year by pint capacity, duty cycle, and electricity rate
- [Pool Pump Running Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/pool-pump-running-cost.html): Calculate the cost to run a pool pump per day, month, and season; compare single-speed vs variable-speed pump savings
- [Humidifier Running Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/humidifier-running-cost.html): Calculate the cost to run a humidifier per hour, day, month, and year by type and electricity rate; compare cool mist vs warm mist running cost
- [Chest & Upright Freezer Running Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/freezer-running-cost.html): Calculate the cost to run a chest or upright deep freezer per month and year by size and type; compare chest vs upright freezer running cost
- [Hot Tub Running Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/hot-tub-running-cost.html): Calculate hot tub running cost per day, month, and year; compare inflatable vs built-in hot tub electricity costs

- [AC Running Cost Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/ac-running-cost.html): Calculate how much your air conditioner costs to run per hour, day, and month — by BTU, SEER rating, daily usage, and local electricity rate

## Calculators: Solar & Renewables

Tools for evaluating solar panels, wind turbines, and battery storage.

- [Solar Panel Savings Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/solar-panel-savings.html): Estimate annual electricity savings from a solar installation based on location, system size, and current bill
- [Solar Panel ROI Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/solar-panel-roi.html): Calculate payback period and 25-year return on investment for a solar system after incentives
- [Solar CO2 Offset Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/solar-co2-offset-calculator.html): Calculate how much CO2 solar panels offset per year and over 25 years — with tree-planting and car-miles equivalents
- [Wind Turbine Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/wind-turbine.html): Estimate electricity output and savings from a small home wind turbine
- [Battery Storage Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/battery-storage.html): Find the right battery storage size for a home solar setup and model financial impact
- [Green Home Upgrade ROI Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/green-home-upgrade-roi.html): Compare payback period and long-term return across green home upgrades (solar, insulation, heat pump, LED, smart thermostat, windows)

## Calculators: Carbon Footprint

Tools for measuring and reducing personal and household carbon emissions.

- [Carbon Footprint Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/carbon-footprint.html): Calculate total annual personal carbon footprint across electricity, gas, driving, flights, and diet
- [Home Carbon Footprint Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/home-carbon-footprint.html): Calculate carbon emissions specifically from home heating, cooling, and appliances
- [Car vs EV Carbon Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/car-vs-ev-carbon.html): Compare lifetime carbon emissions of a gasoline car vs an electric vehicle
- [Flight Carbon Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/flight-carbon.html): Calculate CO₂ emissions per flight route and estimate offset requirements
- [Diet Carbon Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/diet-carbon.html): Quantify how diet choices contribute to personal carbon footprint
- [Tree Planting Offset Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/tree-planting-offset.html): Calculate how many trees are needed to offset a given CO₂ amount

## Calculators: Water & Environment

Tools for water usage and rainwater harvesting.

- [Water Usage Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/water-usage.html): Estimate household water consumption by activity and identify reduction opportunities
- [Rainwater Harvesting Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/rainwater-harvesting.html): Calculate annual rainwater collection potential from a roof by area, rainfall, and material; estimate water bill savings
- [Washing Machine Water Usage Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/washing-machine-water-usage.html): Calculate gallons per load and annual water consumption by washer type; compare standard vs ENERGY STAR and see upgrade savings

## Calculators: Solar & Renewables (Additional)

- [How Many Solar Panels Do I Need? Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/solar-panel-count-calculator.html): Enter monthly electricity use and location to get exact panel count, system size, roof space required, and estimated cost and payback

## Calculators: Energy Savings (Additional)

- [Why Is My Electric Bill So High? Spike Calculator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/tools/electric-bill-spike-calculator.html): Diagnose an electric bill spike by entering bill amounts and usage changes; estimates the cost contribution of AC, EV charging, new appliances, and other common causes

## Blog Articles

In-depth guides on energy savings, solar, carbon reduction, and environmental topics.

- [How Much Does It Cost to Run a Refrigerator?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-run-a-refrigerator.html): Annual, monthly, and daily running costs by refrigerator type and age — with ENERGY STAR upgrade payback analysis
- [How to Lower Your Electric Bill in Summer](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-to-lower-electric-bill-in-summer.html): 11 proven strategies ranked by dollar impact to cut summer cooling costs by 20–40% without sacrificing comfort
- [How Much CO2 Does Solar Save? Real Numbers by System Size](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-co2-does-solar-save.html): Full carbon math behind residential solar — annual and lifetime CO2 offset by system size, grid region, and real-world equivalents
- [Best Thermostat Settings to Save Money on Heating and Cooling](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/best-thermostat-settings-to-save-money.html): DOE-recommended temperature targets by season and time of day, with real savings estimates and system-type guidance
- [How to Save on Laundry Energy Costs: Washer & Dryer Guide](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-to-save-on-laundry-energy-costs.html): Complete breakdown of where laundry energy costs come from and ranked savings changes — from free cold-water switching to heat pump dryer upgrades
- [How Much Does an EV Save on Fuel Costs? Real Numbers by State](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-does-an-ev-save-on-fuel-costs.html): State-by-state EV fuel savings calculation with the formula, real cost comparisons, and the impact of home vs. public charging
- [How to Lower Your Heating Bill: 12 Ways to Cut Costs This Winter](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-to-lower-your-heating-bill.html): Ranked guide from free thermostat adjustments to heat pump upgrades — with real savings estimates for each
- [How Much Water Does a Washing Machine Use Per Load?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-water-does-a-washing-machine-use.html): Water usage by washer type, financial case for ENERGY STAR upgrade, and how to reduce laundry water use
- [What to Know Before Installing Solar Panels](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/solar-panel-guide.html): Costs, incentives, payback periods, choosing an installer, and common mistakes — complete pre-purchase guide
- [Is It Cheaper to Heat or Cool Your Home?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/is-it-cheaper-to-heat-or-cool-your-home.html): Regional cost breakdown showing whether heating or cooling costs more — with actual dollar figures by city and fuel type
- [How Much Does It Cost to Run a Dryer?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-run-a-dryer.html): Per-load, per-month, and per-year running costs for electric and gas dryers by usage frequency and local electricity rate
- [How Much Does It Cost to Run a Space Heater?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-run-a-space-heater.html): Exact cost per hour, per day, and per month for 750W–1,500W space heaters — with an honest look at when space heaters actually save money vs. central heat
- [How Many Solar Panels Do I Need?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-many-solar-panels-do-i-need.html): Step-by-step calculation methodology with state-by-state examples and installer quote verification
- [Solar Panel Tax Credits & Incentives by State (2026)](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/solar-incentives-by-state.html): State-by-state breakdown of solar rebates, tax credits, and net metering policies
- [Renewable Energy Subsidies: The Complete U.S. Guide](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/renewable-energy-subsidies.html): Federal tax credits, state rebates, and utility incentives for solar, wind, heat pumps, and more
- [How Many Trees to Offset Your Carbon Footprint?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-many-trees-to-offset-carbon-footprint.html): Real math on how many mature trees are needed to offset 1 ton of CO2, one person's footprint, or a year of driving
- [Are Carbon Offsets Worth It? A Practical Guide](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/are-carbon-offsets-worth-it.html): A balanced guide to how carbon offsets work, how to evaluate quality and avoid low-quality credits, and when reducing emissions directly is the better move
- [Heat Pump vs Furnace: Which Is Better for Your Home?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/heat-pump-vs-furnace.html): Cost, efficiency, and climate suitability comparison to determine the right heating system
- [15 Ways to Reduce Your Electric Bill This Year](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/reduce-electric-bill.html): No-cost to high-ROI changes ranked by actual dollar savings
- [How to Reduce Water Usage at Home: 14 High-Impact Changes](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-to-reduce-water-usage-at-home.html): Evidence-based water conservation methods ranked by gallons saved, with costs and payback periods
- [Practical Ways to Reduce Your Carbon Footprint](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/reduce-carbon-footprint.html): High-impact personal actions ranked by actual CO₂ savings, with real numbers
- [EV vs Gas Car: True Cost of Ownership Over 5 Years](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/ev-vs-gas-true-cost.html): Full 5-year cost comparison including purchase, fuel, insurance, maintenance, and depreciation
- [How Much Does It Cost to Run AC All Day?](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-run-ac.html): Per-hour, per-day, and seasonal AC running cost by system size and electricity rate — with an interactive calculator
- [Solar Panel Cost in 2026: What Homeowners Actually Pay](https://ecoenergycalc.com/blog/solar-panel-cost-2026.html): Real installed cost by system size and state, 30% ITC breakdown, financing options, and whether solar is worth it in 2026

## Compare: Solar & Renewables

Side-by-side comparisons of solar financing, technology, and renewable energy choices.

- [Solar Lease vs Buy vs Loan](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/solar-lease-vs-buy-vs-loan.html): Full comparison of solar financing options — ownership, tax credit eligibility, and long-term cost differences
- [Solar Panels vs Home Wind Turbine](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/solar-panels-vs-wind-turbine.html): When solar and wind make sense for residential use — cost, output, and viability by location
- [Solar Panels vs Battery Storage](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/solar-panels-vs-battery-storage.html): Whether adding a battery to solar is financially justified based on net metering policy and utility rates
- [Monocrystalline vs Polycrystalline Solar Panels](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/monocrystalline-vs-polycrystalline-solar.html): Efficiency, cost, and space requirements compared for both solar cell technologies
- [On-Grid vs Off-Grid Solar](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/on-grid-vs-off-grid-solar.html): Cost and practicality comparison of grid-tied, off-grid, and hybrid solar systems
- [Solar + Battery vs Generator](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/solar-vs-generator.html): Backup power comparison — upfront cost, operating cost, and long-term economics

## Compare: Transport & Carbon

- [EV vs Gas Car](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/ev-vs-gas-car.html): Full 5-year cost and carbon comparison of electric vs gasoline vehicles
- [EV vs Hybrid vs Gas Car](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/ev-vs-hybrid-vs-gas.html): Annual fuel and maintenance costs for all three powertrain options
- [Electric Bike vs Car](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/electric-bike-vs-car.html): Cost and carbon comparison for urban commuters considering an e-bike
- [Driving vs Flying: Carbon Footprint](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/driving-vs-flying-carbon.html): CO₂ comparison by distance, occupancy, and transport mode
- [Public Transport vs Car](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/public-transport-vs-car.html): Full cost and carbon comparison for urban commuters

## Compare: Home Heating & Cooling

- [Heat Pump vs Furnace vs Gas Boiler](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/heat-pump-vs-furnace-vs-boiler.html): Installation cost, annual operating cost, and efficiency comparison for all three heating systems
- [Central AC vs Window AC Unit](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/central-ac-vs-window-unit.html): When central air conditioning is worth the cost vs. window or portable units
- [Electric Heat vs Gas Heat](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/electric-heat-vs-gas-heat.html): Regional cost comparison formula and crossover point for electric vs gas heating
- [Smart Thermostat vs Programmable Thermostat](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/smart-thermostat-vs-programmable.html): Cost, savings, and payback comparison for both thermostat types
- [Portable AC vs Window AC Unit](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/portable-ac-vs-window-ac.html): Efficiency and cost comparison — when portable units make sense over window ACs

## Compare: Kitchen & Appliances

- [Induction vs Gas vs Electric Stove](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/induction-vs-gas-vs-electric-stove.html): Energy efficiency, annual cost, and cooking performance comparison for all three stove types
- [Electric vs Gas Dryer](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/electric-vs-gas-dryer.html): Per-load cost, annual cost, and payback analysis for electric vs gas dryers
- [Heat Pump Dryer vs Electric Dryer](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/heat-pump-dryer-vs-electric.html): Energy savings, upfront cost, and payback for heat pump dryer upgrades
- [Dishwasher vs Hand Washing](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/dishwasher-vs-hand-washing.html): Water and energy comparison showing when dishwashers are more efficient than hand washing
- [Tankless vs Tank Water Heater](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/tankless-vs-tank-water-heater.html): Efficiency, annual cost, and payback analysis for tankless vs tank water heaters
- [Electric vs Gas Water Heater](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/electric-vs-gas-water-heater.html): Regional cost comparison for electric and gas water heating options
- [Heat Pump Water Heater vs Electric](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/heat-pump-water-heater-vs-electric.html): Energy savings, tax credit, and payback analysis for heat pump water heater upgrades

## Compare: Lighting & Home Efficiency

- [LED vs CFL vs Incandescent Bulbs](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/led-vs-cfl-vs-incandescent.html): Full 25,000-hour cost comparison across all three lighting technologies
- [Spray Foam vs Fiberglass Insulation](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/spray-foam-vs-fiberglass-insulation.html): R-value, air sealing, cost, and when each insulation type is the right choice
- [Double vs Triple Pane Windows](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/double-vs-triple-pane-windows.html): Energy savings, comfort, and payback comparison for window upgrade decisions
- [Solar Water Heater vs Electric](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/solar-water-heater-vs-electric.html): Solar thermal vs heat pump water heater economics in 2026

## Compare: Carbon & Environment

- [Vegan vs Meat Diet: Carbon Footprint](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/vegan-vs-meat-diet-carbon.html): Annual CO₂ emissions by diet type and the most impactful food choices to reduce footprint
- [Wind vs Solar Energy](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/wind-vs-solar-energy.html): Utility-scale cost, capacity factor, land use, and application comparison
- [Propane vs Natural Gas](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/propane-vs-natural-gas.html): Cost per BTU comparison and when to consider switching fuel sources

## Compare: Heating, Cooling & Appliances (Additional)

- [Ceiling Fan vs AC](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/ceiling-fan-vs-ac.html): Cost comparison of ceiling fans vs air conditioning — when fans save money and how to use both together to cut summer bills
- [Central Heat vs Space Heater](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/central-heat-vs-space-heater.html): When space heaters actually save money vs central heat — break-even calculator by fuel type and thermostat setback
- [Gas Dryer vs Heat Pump Dryer](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/gas-dryer-vs-heat-pump-dryer.html): Running cost, payback, and IRA tax credit comparison for gas vs heat pump dryers
- [Train vs Plane Carbon Footprint](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/train-vs-plane-carbon.html): CO2 emissions comparison for rail vs air travel by distance, class, and train type
- [Gas Car vs Hybrid Carbon Footprint](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/gas-car-vs-hybrid-carbon.html): Annual CO2 savings and fuel cost comparison when switching from a gas car to a hybrid
- [Window Insulation vs Window Replacement](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/window-insulation-vs-replacement.html): Cost, savings, and payback comparison of window film vs full replacement



## Glossary

- [Energy & Carbon Glossary](https://ecoenergycalc.com/glossary/): Plain-English definitions of terms used across our calculators — BTU, SEER, kWh, R-value, CO2e, therm, ENERGY STAR, COP, MPGe, HSPF, AFUE, watt vs kilowatt, time-of-use rates, and embodied carbon


## Compare: Water, Solar & Appliances (Additional)

- [Low-Flow vs Standard Showerhead](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/low-flow-vs-standard-showerhead.html): Water, energy, and cost savings calculator comparing 1.5-2.0 GPM low-flow showerheads to 2.5 GPM standard models
- [Rain Barrel vs Municipal Water](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/rain-barrel-vs-municipal-water.html): Cost and payback calculator for rain barrel water harvesting vs municipal water for outdoor irrigation
- [Solar Shingles vs Solar Panels](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/solar-shingles-vs-solar-panels.html): Cost per watt, efficiency, and payback period comparison between building-integrated solar shingles and traditional rooftop panels
- [Front-Load vs Top-Load Washer](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/front-load-vs-top-load-washer.html): Energy and water cost comparison between front-load and top-load washing machines by laundry frequency
- [Whole-House Fan vs Central AC](https://ecoenergycalc.com/compare/whole-house-fan-vs-central-ac.html): Operating cost and cooling capability comparison, with guidance on climate suitability for whole-house fans vs air conditioning
